headline: Albemarle Appoints Michelle T. Collins and Mark R. Widmar to Board of Directors
summary: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB), a global leader in providing essential elements for mobility, energy, connectivity and health, today announced that its Board of Directors (the "Board") has appointed Michelle T. Collins and Mark R. Widmar to the Board, effective February 26, 2026. Collins will join the Board's Audit & Finance Committee and Governance & Public Policy Committee. Widmar will join the Executive Compensation & Talent Development Committee and Safety, Sustainability, Operations & Ca

headline: Albemarle Corporation Announces Cash Tender Offers for Debt Securities and Redemption of 4.650% Senior Notes due 2027
summary: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB), a global leader in providing essential elements for mobility, energy, connectivity and health, today announced the commencement of cash tender offers for certain series of its debt securities and the full redemption of its 4.650% Senior Notes due 2027.

raw.summary: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB), a global leader in providing essential elements for mobility, energy, connectivity and health, today announced the commencement of cash tender offers for certain series of its debt securities and the full redemption of its 4.650% Senior Notes due 2027.

headline: Ketjen’s Acquisition by KPS Capital Partners Now Complete, Ushering in New Era of Innovation and Customer Value
summary: HOUSTON, March 02, 2026--Ketjen Corporation today announced that KPS Capital Partners, LP has successfully completed its acquisition of Ketjen’s refining catalyst business.

raw.headline: Ketjen’s Acquisition by KPS Capital Partners Now Complete, Ushering in New Era of Innovation and Customer Value
raw.summary: HOUSTON, March 02, 2026--Ketjen Corporation today announced that KPS Capital Partners, LP has successfully completed its acquisition of Ketjen’s refining catalyst business.

headline: Albemarle Completes Sale of Controlling Stake in Ketjen to KPS Capital Partners
summary: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB), a global leader in providing essential elements for mobility, energy, connectivity, and health, today announced it has completed the sale of a controlling stake in Ketjen Corporation's refining catalyst solutions business (Ketjen) to affiliates of KPS Capital Partners, LP (KPS).

raw.headline: Albemarle Completes Sale of Controlling Stake in Ketjen to KPS Capital Partners
raw.summary: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB), a global leader in providing essential elements for mobility, energy, connectivity, and health, today announced it has completed the sale of a controlling stake in Ketjen Corporation's refining catalyst solutions business (Ketjen) to affiliates of KPS Capital Partners, LP (KPS).

headline: Chemours Upsizes and Prices $700 Million Senior Notes Offering
summary: CC prices $700M of 7.875% senior notes due 2034, upsizing the deal to refinance 2027 and 2028 debt and reshape its debt profile.

headline: 3 Diversified Chemical Stocks to Watch Amid Demand Woes
summary: Sluggish demand in key end markets and softness in Europe and China have put a dent in the Zacks Chemicals Diversified industry. APD, ALB and DD are poised to navigate the industry challenges.
